# Eduooz International Academy

> Eduooz International Academy is a healthcare exam coaching academy based in Trivandrum, Kerala, India. It prepares candidates for Nursing, Pharmacy, and Lab Technology (MLT) recruitment exams conducted by Kerala PSC, central government bodies (AIIMS, RRB, DSSSB, ESIC, JIPMER, and others), and GCC nursing/pharmacy licensing exams (DHA, HAAD, Prometric, Pearson VUE) in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman, Qatar, Kuwait, and Bahrain.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://www.eduooz.com/): Overview of Eduooz's coaching programs and academy.
- [About Us](https://www.eduooz.com/about.html): Background on the academy.
- [Courses](https://www.eduooz.com/courses.html): Full list of exam coaching programs.
- [Faculty](https://www.eduooz.com/faculties.html): Faculty and mentor profiles.
- [Placements](https://www.eduooz.com/placements.html): Student placement outcomes.
- [Testimonials](https://www.eduooz.com/testimonials.html): Student testimonials.
- [Gallery](https://www.eduooz.com/gallery.html): Photos from the academy.
- [Blogs](https://www.eduooz.com/blogs.html): Articles and exam updates.
- [Publications](https://www.eduooz.com/publications.html): Publications, academic resources, and learning materials from the academy.
- [Contact](https://www.eduooz.com/contact.html): Contact details and location (Trivandrum, Kerala).

## Course Categories

- [Nursing](https://www.eduooz.com/courses/nursing.html): Nursing exam coaching for Kerala, central, and GCC exams.
- [Pharmacy](https://www.eduooz.com/courses/pharmacy.html): Pharmacy exam coaching for Kerala, central, and GCC exams.
- [Lab Technician / MLT](https://www.eduooz.com/courses/mlt.html): Lab Technician (MLT) exam coaching for Kerala and central exams.

## Nursing

Individual nursing exam pages are grouped under /courses/nursing/ by region:
- Central government exams (e.g. AIIMS NORCET, DSSSB, ESIC, JIPMER, RRB, SSC) under /courses/nursing/central/
- Kerala PSC and state exams under /courses/nursing/kerala/
- GCC nursing licensure exams (DHA, HAAD, Prometric, Pearson VUE) under /courses/nursing/gcc/
See /sitemap.xml for the complete, current list of individual nursing exam pages.

## Pharmacy

Individual pharmacy exam pages are grouped under /courses/pharmacy/ by region:
- Central government exams (e.g. GPAT, RRB Pharmacist, UPSC Drug Inspector) under /courses/pharmacy/central/
- Kerala PSC and state exams under /courses/pharmacy/kerala/
- GCC pharmacy licensure exams (DHA, HAAD, Prometric, Pearson VUE) under /courses/pharmacy/gcc/
See /sitemap.xml for the complete, current list of individual pharmacy exam pages.

## Medical Laboratory Technology

Individual lab technician (MLT) exam pages are grouped under /courses/mlt/ by region:
- Central government exams under /courses/mlt/central/
- Kerala PSC and state exams under /courses/mlt/kerala/
See /sitemap.xml for the complete, current list of individual MLT exam pages.

## Resources

- Previous question papers and syllabus documents are provided as downloadable PDFs within individual course pages under /courses/.

## Notes

- Primary location: 2nd floor, Terminal Plaza, Bypass road, Chakkai, Trivandrum, Kerala, India.
- This file is for AI assistants and language models summarizing the site; it is not a sitemap. See /sitemap.xml for the full list of indexable pages.
